title: User last log in via API or method to filter actions by date and type
excerpt: I am looking for an api call to determine a users last log in time to Monday.com to validate license usage. Does such an API exist? Would be great  to have a simple field on the user record or open the login audit data t…

posts.author: rwiltshire (Ryan W)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for an api call to determine a users last log in time to Monday.com to validate license usage. Does such an API exist? Would be great to have a simple field on the user record or open the login audit data to another api.

I did look at updates and boards as possible sources of actions but the rate limitation and lack of filters rule those sources out.

Thanks
